center.name: 画眉科
center.summary: 画眉科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括橙额鸦雀、Dark-fronted babbler、纹胸巨鹛等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Jerdon|Jerdon]], 1839) | range_map=RhopocichlaAtriceps.svg | synonyms = }} The dark-fronted babbler (Dumetia atriceps) is an Old World babbler found in the Western Ghats of India and the forests of Sri Lanka

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Suthora | species = nipalensis | authority = (Hodgson, 1837) | synonyms = Paradoxornis nipalensis }} The black-throated parrotbill (Suthora nipalensis) is a parrotbill species often placed with the Old World babblers (family Timaliidae) or in a distinct family Sylviidae, but it actually seems to belong to the distinct family Paradoxornithidae. It is found in the northern regions of the Indian subcontinent, primarily in the central and eastern Himalayas, and in adjoining parts of Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crescent-chested babbler (Cyanoderma melanothorax) is a babbler species in the family Timaliidae and is native to the Indonesian islands of Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Mixornis gularis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22735162A264167049 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22735162A264167049.en |access-date=14 June 2025}} | genus = Mixornis | species = gularis | authority = (Horsfield, 1822) | range_map = Macronous gularis map.PNG | range_map_caption = Distribution of Mixornis gularis | synonyms = Macronus gularis | synonyms_ref = }} The pin-striped tit-babbler (Mixornis gularis), also known as the yellow-breasted babbler, is a species of bird in the Old World babbler family Timaliidae that is found in South and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ferrugilatusNagarjun Forest, Kathmandu, Nepal]] The rusty-cheeked scimitar babbler (Erythrogenys erythrogenys) is a passerine bird in the babbler family Timaliidae that is found in the Himalayas from northeast Pakistan to Bhutan
